plan: Create `src/styles/reset.css` — a minimal CSS reset that sets `margin: 0`, `padding: 0`, `box-sizing: border-box` on all elements, sets `html, body` to `width: 100vw`, `height: 100dvh`, `overflow: hidden` to fill the viewport and suppress default scrollbars.

Create `src/styles/shell.css` — styles for the two top-level containers: `#generated-site` (full-screen, position absolute, inset 0, overflow auto) and `#overlay-ui` (position fixed, inset 0, pointer-events none, z-index above generated-site) so they layer correctly.

Update `index.html` — inside `
`, add two child containers: `
` and `
`. Keep the existing `#app` mount point.

Update `src/main.ts` — import `./styles/reset.css` and `./styles/shell.css`. Replace the placeholder `textContent` assignment with logic that ensures the two containers exist (query them from `#app`). No complex JS needed; the DOM structure is static in index.html.

Create `tests/us-003-application-shell.test.ts` — Vitest tests covering all acceptance criteria: (1) verify `#generated-site` and `#overlay-ui` containers exist in index.html, (2) verify reset.css sets html/body to 100vw/100dvh with overflow hidden, (3) verify shell.css positions generated-site absolutely with inset 0, (4) verify overlay-ui is fixed with pointer-events none, (5) verify no explicit scrollbar styles leak (overflow hidden on body).
Run `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, and `npm run test` to validate all existing and new tests pass with no regressions.
testing_recommendations: Unit test: parse reset.css and assert html/body have overflow:hidden, width:100vw, height:100dvh
Unit test: parse shell.css and assert #generated-site has position:absolute, inset:0
Unit test: parse shell.css and assert #overlay-ui has position:fixed, pointer-events:none, z-index above generated-site
Unit test: parse index.html and assert #generated-site and #overlay-ui exist as children of #app
Unit test: verify no default scrollbars by checking overflow:hidden on body in reset.css
Manual test: open dev server, resize browser window — layout should adapt without page reload (CSS viewport units handle this inherently)
Regression: run existing us-001 tests to confirm index.html changes don't break mount point or build
risks: Modifying index.html could break the existing US-001 test that validates mount point structure — need to ensure #app still exists and contains the module script reference
Using 100dvh (dynamic viewport height) may not be supported in older browsers — fallback to 100vh if browser compat is a concern, though CLAUDE.md doesn't mention legacy browser support
overflow:hidden on body will prevent any scrolling globally — generated sites that need scrolling must use overflow:auto on #generated-site container specifically
pointer-events:none on #overlay-ui means interactive children (buttons) will need pointer-events:auto set individually — this is intentional but must be documented for downstream tickets
